symptoms: ENOSPC: System limit for number of file watchers reached
root_cause: Metro relies on file watching; on Linux the inotify watch limit is too low and Watchman may be missing.
fix: Install Watchman: 'brew install watchman' (macOS) or build from source on Linux
On Linux raise the limit: echo fs.inotify.max_user_watches=524288 | sudo tee -a /etc/sysctl.conf && sudo sysctl -p
Clear Metro cache: npx react-native start --reset-cache

symptoms: choosing between Expo and bare React Native
root_cause: Teams pick the wrong workflow and later fight ejection or missing native modules.
fix: Default to Expo (managed) with config plugins — it supports most native modules via prebuild
Use 'npx expo prebuild' to generate ios/ and android/ when you need custom native code, instead of fully ejecting
Choose bare RN only when you must heavily customize native build pipelines from day one

symptoms: error: EMFILE: too many open files, watch
root_cause: macOS default file descriptor limit is exceeded by Metro's watcher without Watchman.
fix: Install and start Watchman: brew install watchman
If it persists: watchman watch-del-all && watchman shutdown-server
Restart Metro with --reset-cache

symptoms: Unable to resolve module from project
module works in Node but not Metro
root_cause: Metro has its own resolver and does not read tsconfig/jsconfig path aliases by default.
fix: Add aliases in metro.config.js via resolver.extraNodeModules or use babel-plugin-module-resolver
Keep tsconfig 'paths' in sync with the babel/metro alias config
Restart with --reset-cache after changing resolver config

symptoms: need to import SVG/JSON/custom asset types in Metro
root_cause: Metro only bundles known asset/source extensions unless configured.
fix: For SVG: npm i react-native-svg react-native-svg-transformer, set transformer.babelTransformerPath and resolver.sourceExts/assetExts in metro.config.js
Add custom extensions to resolver.sourceExts
Restart Metro with --reset-cache

symptoms: old code still running after edit
root_cause: Metro and native build caches serve stale artifacts.
fix: Stop Metro, then: npx react-native start --reset-cache
Clear watchman: watchman watch-del-all
Delete node_modules/.cache and reinstall if needed; for iOS clear DerivedData, for Android run ./gradlew clean

root_cause: Navigation requires correct provider setup and native dependencies.
fix: Install @react-navigation/native plus react-native-screens and react-native-safe-area-context
Wrap the app root in <NavigationContainer>
Use @react-navigation/native-stack (native perf) over the JS stack where possible

symptoms: navigation crashes on Android after enableScreens
root_cause: react-native-screens not linked/configured, or MainActivity missing the fragment fix on Android.
fix: Ensure react-native-screens is installed and pods are reinstalled (iOS)
On Android add the onCreate(null) override in MainActivity per the docs to avoid fragment state crash
Rebuild the native app (not just reload JS)

root_cause: expo-router provides file-based routing across iOS, Android, and web.
fix: Install expo-router and set 'main' to expo-router/entry
Create app/ directory with _layout.tsx and route files
Use the same routes for web export (expo export -p web)

symptoms: iOS vs Android vs web behavior differs
root_cause: Platform differences require branching or platform-specific files.
fix: Use Platform.OS ('ios' | 'android' | 'web') or Platform.select({ ios, android, web, default })
Use platform extensions: Component.ios.tsx, Component.android.tsx, Component.web.tsx (Metro picks automatically)
Keep shared logic in a base file and isolate platform code in the extensions

symptoms: web build fails to resolve react-native
root_cause: react-native imports must be aliased to react-native-web for the web target, and the web entry must register the app.
fix: Install react-native-web and react-dom; with Expo this is preconfigured
For custom webpack/vite, alias 'react-native' -> 'react-native-web' and add appropriate extensions (.web.tsx first)
Register the root with AppRegistry.runApplication on web

symptoms: using onPress handlers but no hover/focus on web
root_cause: Mobile-only interaction patterns ignore web pointer, hover, and keyboard semantics.
fix: Use Pressable which exposes hovered/focused states for web
Provide accessibilityRole and accessible props so keyboard/AT works on web
Test tab order and focus rings in the browser

symptoms: shadow styles don't show on Android
root_cause: iOS uses shadow* props; Android uses elevation. Web uses boxShadow.
fix: Use elevation on Android, shadow* props on iOS, combine via Platform.select
On react-native-web, boxShadow is supported; map accordingly
Consider a cross-platform wrapper or a library that normalizes shadows

root_cause: Safe area insets are not applied on notched devices.
fix: Wrap app in SafeAreaProvider from react-native-safe-area-context
Use SafeAreaView or useSafeAreaInsets() for fine control
Avoid hardcoding status bar heights

symptoms: flex layout behaves differently than CSS
root_cause: React Native defaults to flexDirection 'column' and position 'relative', unlike the web's 'row'/'static'.
fix: Set flexDirection explicitly when you expect row layout
Remember default alignItems is 'stretch'
Use flex: 1 on containers that must fill available space

root_cause: No keyboard avoidance configured.
fix: Wrap forms in KeyboardAvoidingView with behavior='padding' on iOS and 'height'/undefined on Android
For lists/scroll use a library like react-native-keyboard-aware-scroll-view or react-native-keyboard-controller
Set android:windowSoftInputMode appropriately in AndroidManifest

root_cause: Mismatched compileSdk/targetSdk, duplicate resources, or a library requiring a newer SDK.
fix: Align compileSdkVersion/targetSdkVersion in android/build.gradle with library requirements
Run ./gradlew clean and rebuild
Check for duplicate resource names across modules

root_cause: Installed JDK version is incompatible with the Android Gradle Plugin.
fix: Use a supported JDK (commonly JDK 17 for AGP 8.x); set JAVA_HOME accordingly
Pin gradle distributionUrl to a compatible version
Verify with ./gradlew --version inside android/

symptoms: works in debug, crashes in release
root_cause: ProGuard/R8 minification strips classes, or release signing/Hermes config differs from debug.
fix: Add ProGuard keep rules for native modules that use reflection
Test with: cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease, then install the APK
Verify Hermes is enabled consistently and signing config is correct

root_cause: Release builds require a signing keystore configured in Gradle.
fix: Generate: keytool -genkeypair -v -keystore release.keystore -alias mykey -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000
Store credentials in ~/.gradle/gradle.properties (never commit them)
Reference signingConfigs.release in android/app/build.gradle; or use EAS managed credentials

root_cause: Two dependencies pull conflicting versions of the same library (e.g., AndroidX/support).
fix: Run ./gradlew app:dependencies to find the conflict
Force a single version via resolutionStrategy in android/build.gradle
Enable Jetifier if a legacy support-lib dependency remains

symptoms: CocoaPods could not find compatible versions
root_cause: Stale CocoaPods spec repo or incompatible pod versions.
fix: cd ios && pod repo update && pod install
If using Expo, run 'npx expo prebuild --clean' to regenerate the ios project
Delete ios/Pods and Podfile.lock then reinstall if conflicts persist

symptoms: Signing for app requires a development team
No profiles for bundle identifier found
root_cause: Missing Apple development team / provisioning profile in Xcode.
fix: Open ios/*.xcworkspace in Xcode, select the target → Signing & Capabilities, choose a Team
Enable 'Automatically manage signing' for development
For CI/release use EAS credentials or manual provisioning profiles

symptoms: ios build fails on Xcode 15 with sandbox error
root_cause: Xcode 15 user script sandboxing blocks RN build scripts.
fix: Set ENABLE_USER_SCRIPT_SANDBOXING = NO in the project build settings
Clean DerivedData and rebuild
Update react-native to a version that patches the build phase

symptoms: weird iOS build errors after dependency change
linker errors that make no sense
root_cause: Stale Xcode DerivedData / Pods cache.
fix: Delete ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData
cd ios && rm -rf Pods Podfile.lock && pod install
In Xcode: Product → Clean Build Folder (Shift+Cmd+K), then rebuild

symptoms: crash when accessing camera/location on iOS
root_cause: iOS requires Info.plist usage description strings for protected resources.
fix: Add NSCameraUsageDescription, NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription, etc. to Info.plist
With Expo, set them via the relevant config plugin in app.json
Re-run prebuild/pod install and rebuild

symptoms: want smaller bundle and faster startup
root_cause: Hermes is the optimized JS engine for RN and is the default on recent versions.
fix: Keep Hermes enabled (default in RN 0.70+) for faster startup and lower memory
Generate Hermes source maps for production stack traces
If a dependency assumes JSC, verify Hermes compatibility before disabling

root_cause: The New Architecture (Fabric renderer + TurboModules) requires compatible libraries and interop config.
fix: Enable via newArchEnabled=true (Android gradle.properties) and RCT_NEW_ARCH_ENABLED=1 (iOS pod install)
Audit native dependencies for New Architecture support; use the interop layer for legacy modules
Test thoroughly on both platforms; roll out gradually

root_cause: ScrollView renders all children; large lists must be virtualized.
fix: Use FlatList/SectionList (or FlashList) instead of ScrollView for long lists
Provide keyExtractor and a memoized renderItem; set getItemLayout for fixed heights
Tune windowSize/initialNumToRender/maxToRenderPerBatch; consider @shopify/flash-list

root_cause: Inline functions/objects and unmemoized components cause re-render storms.
fix: Memoize components with React.memo and callbacks with useCallback
Avoid creating new style/array/object literals inline in hot paths
Use a profiler (React DevTools, Flipper) to find the offending renders

root_cause: Animations on the JS thread compete with business logic.
fix: Use react-native-reanimated to run animations on the UI thread (worklets)
For Animated API, set useNativeDriver: true where supported
Avoid animating layout properties that trigger expensive relayout

root_cause: Default Image lacks caching/downsampling for large remote images.
fix: Use expo-image (or FastImage) for disk/memory caching and better decoding
Resize images server-side or request appropriately sized variants
Set explicit width/height and use contentFit to avoid layout thrash

symptoms: network request fails on Android release
root_cause: Android blocks cleartext (HTTP) traffic by default since API 28.
fix: Use HTTPS endpoints
If HTTP is required for dev only, set android:usesCleartextTraffic via a network security config (not in production)
Verify the device/emulator can reach the host (localhost = 10.0.2.2 on Android emulator)

symptoms: fetch to localhost fails on device
API works on simulator not on phone
root_cause: localhost on a physical device points to the device itself, not your dev machine.
fix: Use your machine's LAN IP (e.g., http://192.168.x.x:3000) for physical devices
Android emulator maps host loopback to 10.0.2.2; iOS simulator can use localhost
Ensure firewall allows the port and device is on the same network

symptoms: CORS error only on web build
request blocked by browser in react-native-web
root_cause: On web, fetch runs in the browser and is subject to CORS; native apps are not.
fix: Enable proper CORS headers on the API for the web origin
Use a dev proxy for local web development
Branch behavior with Platform.OS==='web' where the network model differs

symptoms: need to persist small key/value data
root_cause: Local persistence requires an async storage layer.
fix: Use @react-native-async-storage/async-storage for simple key/value (string only)
Serialize objects with JSON.stringify/parse
For performance-critical or larger data, prefer react-native-mmkv (synchronous, fast)

symptoms: where to keep auth tokens securely
root_cause: AsyncStorage is not encrypted; secrets need secure storage.
fix: Use expo-secure-store or react-native-keychain (Keychain on iOS, Keystore on Android)
Never store secrets in AsyncStorage or in plaintext
On web, secure storage is limited — prefer httpOnly cookies via your backend

symptoms: native module X is not available
undefined is not an object NativeModules
root_cause: A native module isn't linked or the app wasn't rebuilt after install.
fix: Rebuild the native app (npx expo run:ios/android or via Xcode/Android Studio) — JS reload is not enough
iOS: re-run pod install; autolinking handles most modules in RN 0.60+
Confirm the module supports your platform (some are mobile-only and break on web)

symptoms: native-only module imported in web bundle
root_cause: A native-only dependency has no web implementation and breaks the web build.
fix: Guard usage behind Platform.OS !== 'web' and lazy-import the module
Provide a .web.tsx stub implementation
Check if the library ships a react-native-web compatible build

root_cause: Debugging RN needs the right tooling per concern.
fix: Use the React Native DevTools (built-in, press 'j' in Metro) for console/breakpoints
Use React DevTools for component tree and profiling
Use Reactotron or Flipper for network/state inspection where supported

symptoms: Warning: Each child in a list should have a unique key prop
root_cause: List items rendered without stable unique keys.
fix: Provide a stable keyExtractor for FlatList or unique key when mapping
Do not use array index as key for dynamic/reorderable lists
Ensure ids are unique across the dataset

symptoms: how to build app binaries in the cloud
root_cause: Local native builds need platform toolchains; EAS Build runs them in the cloud.
fix: Install eas-cli, run 'eas build:configure'
Build with 'eas build -p ios' / '-p android' (iOS build needs no local Mac)
Submit with 'eas submit' to the App Store/Play Store

symptoms: push JS-only updates without app store review
root_cause: JS/asset changes can ship over-the-air without a new binary.
fix: Use expo-updates with EAS Update; configure runtimeVersion policy
Publish with 'eas update --branch production'
Remember native changes still require a new build; only JS/assets go OTA

symptoms: preparing first app store / play store release
root_cause: Store submissions have many easy-to-miss requirements.
fix: Set unique bundle identifier/package name, version, and build number
Provide app icons, splash, privacy policy, and required usage descriptions
Build release binaries, test on real devices, then 'eas submit' or upload manually

root_cause: Push requires platform credentials (APNs key for iOS, FCM for Android) and permission prompts.
fix: Request permission and fetch the token with expo-notifications (or your provider SDK)
Configure APNs auth key (iOS) and FCM server credentials (Android), e.g. via EAS credentials
Test on a physical device — push does not work on iOS simulators

symptoms: universal links / app links not working
root_cause: Deep linking requires URL scheme/associated-domain config plus navigation linking setup.
fix: Define a scheme (app.json scheme) and configure react-navigation/expo-router linking
iOS Universal Links: add Associated Domains + apple-app-site-association file on your domain
Android App Links: add intent filters + assetlinks.json; verify with adb

root_cause: react-native-gesture-handler root setup missing.
fix: Wrap the app root in GestureHandlerRootView with flex: 1
Ensure the import is at the very top of index.js for older setups
Rebuild the native app after installing

root_cause: Fonts must be bundled and loaded before use.
fix: Expo: load with useFonts/expo-font and gate rendering until loaded
Bare: add font files and link via react-native.config.js + npx react-native-asset
Reference the exact PostScript/font family name, which can differ from the filename

root_cause: Anything bundled into the app is readable; env handling differs from server apps.
fix: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_ prefix (Expo) or react-native-config for public config
Never ship real secrets in the app bundle; keep them server-side
Use EAS environment variables/secrets for build-time values

symptoms: TypeScript path aliases not resolving at runtime
root_cause: TS only checks types; runtime resolution is Metro/Babel's job.
fix: Add babel-plugin-module-resolver with matching aliases in babel.config.js
Keep tsconfig.json 'paths' in sync
Restart Metro with --reset-cache after changes

root_cause: RN needs a configured Jest preset and a component testing library.
fix: Use the react-native (or jest-expo) Jest preset
Use @testing-library/react-native for behavior-focused component tests
Mock native modules in jest setup to avoid 'native module not found' in tests

root_cause: E2E needs a gray-box runner that drives the real app.
fix: Use Detox for iOS/Android E2E with synchronization
Use Maestro for simpler, YAML-based flows across platforms
Run E2E in CI on simulators/emulators via EAS or your pipeline

symptoms: share code between Next.js web and React Native app
root_cause: Sharing UI/logic across RN and web needs a monorepo and react-native-web aliasing.
fix: Use a monorepo (pnpm/yarn workspaces, Turborepo) with shared packages
Adopt Expo Router or Solito to share navigation between Next.js and RN
Alias react-native to react-native-web in the Next.js build and transpile RN packages

symptoms: Next.js fails to compile react-native imports
SyntaxError: Unexpected token export from react-native package
root_cause: RN packages ship untranspiled Flow/ESM that Next.js doesn't process by default.
fix: Add transpilePackages: ['react-native', 'react-native-web', ...] in next.config.js
Alias 'react-native' -> 'react-native-web' in webpack config
Ensure extensions resolve .web.js/.web.tsx first

symptoms: hydration mismatch with react-native-web in Next.js SSR
styles differ between server and client
root_cause: react-native-web style flushing must be wired into the SSR document.
fix: Use AppRegistry.getApplication to render to string and inject getStyleElement into the HTML head on the server
Ensure the same RNW version on server and client
Keep platform-conditional rendering deterministic between server and client

root_cause: Not every native API maps to the web.
fix: Layout, View/Text/Pressable, StyleSheet, and Animated/Reanimated work on web
Native-only modules (camera, BLE, etc.) need web fallbacks or guards
Test responsive behavior with Dimensions/useWindowDimensions and media-query-like logic

symptoms: Invariant Violation: Module AppRegistry is not a registered callable module
app fails to load after upgrade
root_cause: Bundle didn't load (Metro not running/connected) or a native/JS version mismatch.
fix: Confirm Metro is running and the app points to the right host/port
Reset cache and rebuild the native app
Verify react-native and react versions match the expected pairing

symptoms: Text strings must be rendered within a <Text> component
root_cause: A raw string is placed directly inside a View instead of a Text element.
fix: Wrap all text in <Text>...</Text>
Check for stray strings/whitespace or conditional && that renders a string
On web this is tolerated, so the bug often appears only on native

symptoms: VirtualizedList: You have a large list that is slow to update
root_cause: Nesting a VirtualizedList inside a plain ScrollView of the same orientation breaks virtualization.
fix: Use a single FlatList and put extra content in ListHeaderComponent/ListFooterComponent
For mixed content, use SectionList or a single virtualized list
Avoid same-orientation nesting of scrollables

root_cause: RN upgrades touch native template files that package managers don't update automatically.
fix: Use the React Native Upgrade Helper to diff template changes between versions
For Expo, run 'npx expo install --fix' and follow the SDK upgrade guide
Reinstall pods, clean Gradle, and rebuild both platforms after upgrading

symptoms: app crashes on launch only on Android 13+
root_cause: Android 13 (API 33) requires runtime permission for notifications and stricter intent rules.
fix: Request POST_NOTIFICATIONS at runtime before showing notifications
Declare the permission in AndroidManifest
Test on an API 33+ emulator/device

root_cause: Re-rendering the whole screen on each keystroke or fighting controlled state.
fix: Keep TextInput state local; lift only on submit/blur
Use defaultValue + onChangeText for uncontrolled inputs where possible
Memoize parent components so each keystroke doesn't re-render the tree

root_cause: Keyboard not configured for the input semantics.
fix: Set keyboardType (email-address, numeric, phone-pad, decimal-pad)
Set returnKeyType and onSubmitEditing to move focus
Use textContentType/autoComplete for autofill on iOS/Android

root_cause: Remote images need explicit dimensions; local assets must be required statically.
fix: Give remote <Image source={{uri}}/> an explicit width/height (or flex)
Use require('./img.png') for static assets (string paths don't bundle)
For many cached images use expo-image/FastImage

symptoms: pull to refresh on a list
root_cause: Refresh UX requires RefreshControl wired to a loading state.
fix: Pass refreshControl={<RefreshControl refreshing onRefresh/>} to FlatList/ScrollView
Track a 'refreshing' boolean and reset it when data resolves
Avoid blocking the UI thread during refresh

symptoms: Modal renders behind content on Android
root_cause: Native Modal has platform-specific stacking and status-bar behavior.
fix: Use the Modal statusBarTranslucent prop on Android when needed
Consider react-native-modal or a portal-based approach for complex cases
Test hardware back button closes the modal (onRequestClose)

root_cause: Multiple press primitives exist with different capabilities.
fix: Prefer Pressable for new code (states: pressed/hovered/focused)
Button is intentionally minimal/unstyled — wrap Pressable for custom UI
Add hitSlop for small tappable targets and accessibilityRole='button'

root_cause: Theme must react to the OS appearance setting.
fix: Read useColorScheme() ('light'|'dark') and derive a theme
Provide a ThemeContext; avoid hardcoded colors
On web, react-native-web maps to prefers-color-scheme

root_cause: Deep OS interactions go through the Linking API.
fix: Linking.openURL('https://...'|'tel:'|'mailto:')
Linking.openSettings() to send users to app settings (permissions)
Guard with canOpenURL and handle rejections

root_cause: Dimensions.get('window') captured once doesn't update on rotation/resize.
fix: Use useWindowDimensions() which re-renders on change
Design with flex and percentages instead of fixed pixel widths
Test landscape and tablet/large-screen layouts

root_cause: Status bar appearance must be set explicitly per screen.
fix: Use <StatusBar barStyle and backgroundColor (Android)/>
With expo-status-bar use the StatusBar component
Coordinate with safe-area insets and translucency

root_cause: Clipboard moved out of core into a community package.
fix: Install @react-native-clipboard/clipboard (or expo-clipboard)
Clipboard.setString(text) / await Clipboard.getStringAsync()
On web, requires a user gesture and HTTPS

root_cause: Sharing uses the platform share sheet.
fix: Use the core Share.share({ message, url })
For files use expo-sharing or react-native-share
Handle the dismissed/shared result

root_cause: Text overflow needs explicit truncation props.
fix: Set numberOfLines and ellipsizeMode on <Text>
Ensure the container has a bounded width
For middle truncation use ellipsizeMode='middle'

root_cause: Grid layouts still need virtualization.
fix: Use FlatList numColumns for grids; set columnWrapperStyle
For variable heights consider masonry via FlashList
Avoid mapping into a ScrollView for large grids

root_cause: Missing accessibility props.
fix: Set accessible, accessibilityLabel, accessibilityRole, accessibilityState
Group related elements with accessible containers
Test with VoiceOver (iOS) and TalkBack (Android)

root_cause: Param lists must be typed for type-safe navigation.
fix: Define a ParamList type and type the navigator generics
Use NativeStackScreenProps<ParamList,'Screen'> for props
Access typed params via route.params

root_cause: Composed navigators need correct nesting and param passing.
fix: Nest navigators as components inside screens
Navigate to nested routes with { screen, params }
Keep each navigator's ParamList typed

root_cause: Header is configured via screenOptions/options.
fix: Set options={{ headerShown, title, headerRight }}
Use navigation.setOptions for dynamic headers
For custom headers provide a header function

root_cause: Back/leave needs the beforeRemove event.
fix: Subscribe to navigation 'beforeRemove' and call e.preventDefault()
Prompt the user, then navigation.dispatch(e.data.action) to proceed
On Android also handle the hardware back button

root_cause: Modal presentation is a stack option.
fix: Use presentation:'modal' (or 'transparentModal') on the stack screen
For bottom sheets use @gorhom/bottom-sheet
Manage focus/scroll inside the modal

root_cause: Navigation state is in-memory by default.
fix: Use NavigationContainer initialState + onStateChange with AsyncStorage
Guard restoration behind a loading flag
Be careful persisting auth-gated routes

root_cause: Tab appearance configured via options.
fix: Set tabBarIcon, tabBarBadge, tabBarActiveTintColor in screenOptions
For fully custom bars pass tabBar={props => <CustomBar/>}
Respect safe-area bottom inset

symptoms: show login vs app based on auth
root_cause: Conditional navigators express auth state.
fix: Render different navigators based on an auth context value
Avoid manually navigating after login — let the tree switch
Keep token in secure storage and hydrate before first render

root_cause: Manual fetching duplicates caching/retry logic.
fix: Use TanStack Query (react-query) for fetching, caching, retries
Wrap app in QueryClientProvider; use useQuery/useMutation
Persist cache with AsyncStorage/MMKV for offline

root_cause: Global UI state needs a simple store.
fix: Use Zustand for minimal global state
Select narrow slices to avoid extra re-renders
Persist with the persist middleware backed by MMKV

root_cause: Complex app state benefits from RTK.
fix: Use Redux Toolkit (createSlice, configureStore)
Use RTK Query for server cache if not using react-query
Wrap app in <Provider store>

root_cause: A single Context value change re-renders all consumers.
fix: Split contexts by concern; memoize the value object
Move rarely-changing and frequently-changing state apart
Prefer a selector-based store (Zustand/Jotai) for hot state

root_cause: Offline support needs local persistence + sync.
fix: Cache reads with react-query persistence (MMKV/AsyncStorage)
Queue mutations and replay on reconnect (NetInfo)
For relational/offline-heavy data use WatermelonDB or expo-sqlite

root_cause: Optimistic updates improve perceived speed.
fix: With react-query useMutation onMutate to update cache, onError to roll back
Reconcile in onSettled by invalidating queries
Show subtle pending indicators

root_cause: Structured local data needs SQLite.
fix: Use expo-sqlite (or op-sqlite) for SQL on device
Run migrations on app start
Keep heavy queries off the JS thread where possible

root_cause: Network status requires NetInfo.
fix: Use @react-native-community/netinfo addEventListener
Debounce transitions to avoid flicker
On web it maps to navigator.onLine

root_cause: Forms need controlled state + validation + submission.
fix: Use react-hook-form with Controller for RN inputs
Validate with zod via @hookform/resolvers
Manage focus order and keyboard avoidance

symptoms: form submit button hidden by keyboard
root_cause: Keyboard overlaps the form action.
fix: Wrap in KeyboardAvoidingView or use react-native-keyboard-controller
Use a KeyboardAwareScrollView for long forms
Add keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled' on the scroll view

root_cause: Masked inputs need formatting logic.
fix: Use react-native-mask-input or format in onChangeText
Keep raw and display values separate
Validate the unmasked value on submit

root_cause: Wizards need step state and partial validation.
fix: Keep a single form state across steps; validate per step
Persist progress so back/forward is safe
Disable Next until the current step is valid

root_cause: Reanimated runs animations as worklets on the UI thread.
fix: Use useSharedValue + useAnimatedStyle from react-native-reanimated
Drive values with withTiming/withSpring
Avoid reading shared values on the JS thread in render

symptoms: Reanimated 2 failed to create a worklet
maybe you forgot to add Reanimated's babel plugin
root_cause: The Reanimated Babel plugin is missing or not last in the plugins list.
fix: Add 'react-native-reanimated/plugin' as the LAST item in babel.config.js plugins
Clear cache: npx react-native start --reset-cache
Rebuild the native app

root_cause: Gesture composition needs the gesture-handler API.
fix: Use Gesture.Pan()/Pinch()/Tap() with GestureDetector
Compose with Gesture.Simultaneous/Exclusive
Wrap root in GestureHandlerRootView

root_cause: Layout transitions need explicit animation.
fix: Use Reanimated Layout animations (entering/exiting/layout)
Or LayoutAnimation.configureNext (enable on Android via UIManager)
Keep animated lists keyed stably

root_cause: Vector animations use Lottie.
fix: Install lottie-react-native and render <LottieView source autoPlay loop/>
Bundle .json animations as assets
Control playback with a ref for interactive cases

root_cause: Perceived performance improves with skeletons.
fix: Use a shimmer (moti/skeleton libs) or animate opacity with Reanimated
Match skeleton shape to content to avoid layout shift
Hide skeletons as soon as data resolves

root_cause: Heavy JS work runs during the transition.
fix: Defer expensive work with InteractionManager.runAfterInteractions
Use native-stack for native transition performance
Reduce mount cost of the destination screen (lazy/placeholder)

symptoms: use Tailwind classes in React Native
root_cause: Tailwind needs an RN-aware implementation.
fix: Use NativeWind (Tailwind for RN) with its Babel/Metro setup
Define tokens in tailwind.config.js; works on web too
Use className on RN components after configuring NativeWind

root_cause: Ad-hoc styles drift without a theme system.
fix: Adopt a theming lib (Restyle, Tamagui) or a ThemeProvider with tokens
Centralize colors/spacing/typography
Support light/dark via the theme

root_cause: Android stacking is driven by elevation, not just zIndex.
fix: Use elevation on Android alongside zIndex
Ensure parent has no overflow:'hidden' clipping the overlay
Test absolute-positioned overlays on both platforms

root_cause: Inline object literals create new references every render.
fix: Use StyleSheet.create for static styles
Memoize dynamic styles with useMemo
Compose arrays [styles.base, condition && styles.active]

symptoms: responsive design for phone and tablet
root_cause: One layout doesn't fit all sizes.
fix: Branch on useWindowDimensions breakpoints
Use flexible layouts (flex, gap, percentage)
On web add media-query-like logic via RNW

symptoms: spacing between fl ex items missing
root_cause: The 'gap' style requires a recent RN version.
fix: Upgrade to a RN version that supports gap (0.71+)
Otherwise add margins or a spacer component
Verify on both platforms and web

symptoms: custom font weights look wrong on Android
root_cause: Android maps fontWeight to bundled font files by exact family name.
fix: Bundle each weight as a separate font file and reference its family name
Avoid relying on numeric fontWeight with custom fonts on Android
Verify the PostScript name matches

root_cause: Camera access needs a native module + permissions.
fix: Use expo-camera or react-native-vision-camera
Declare camera usage strings (iOS) and CAMERA permission (Android)
Request permission at runtime before mounting the camera

root_cause: Media selection uses an image picker.
fix: Use expo-image-picker (launchImageLibraryAsync) or react-native-image-picker
Handle permission and canceled results
Compress/resize before upload

root_cause: Location needs permissions and a native module.
fix: Use expo-location; request foreground (and background if needed) permission
Declare NSLocation* (iOS) and ACCESS_FINE/COARSE_LOCATION (Android)
Handle 'denied' and 'restricted' states gracefully

root_cause: Permissions must be requested in context and handled when denied.
fix: Use react-native-permissions or Expo permission APIs
Request just-in-time with rationale; if blocked, deep-link to settings
Cache status and avoid repeated prompts

root_cause: Haptics use a native module.
fix: Use expo-haptics (impactAsync/notificationAsync)
Use sparingly for meaningful feedback
No-op gracefully on web

root_cause: Biometrics require a secure local auth module.
fix: Use expo-local-authentication (hasHardwareAsync, authenticateAsync)
Declare NSFaceIDUsageDescription on iOS
Always provide a passcode fallback

root_cause: File system access uses a native module.
fix: Use expo-file-system (documentDirectory, downloadAsync)
Respect scoped storage on Android
Clean up cache directory to avoid bloat

root_cause: Media playback uses a dedicated module.
fix: Use expo-av or expo-video / react-native-video
Configure audio mode for background/silent switch (iOS)
Release players on unmount to free memory

root_cause: Sensors are exposed via a module with subscriptions.
fix: Use expo-sensors; subscribe and set update interval
Unsubscribe on unmount to save battery
Throttle high-frequency updates

root_cause: Background execution has strict OS limits.
fix: Use expo-task-manager + expo-background-fetch (or background location)
Register tasks at module scope; declare iOS UIBackgroundModes
Expect throttling — design for opportunistic execution

root_cause: Native + JS crashes need a reporting service.
fix: Integrate Sentry (@sentry/react-native) with the Metro/Hermes plugin
Upload source maps and dSYM/ProGuard mappings for symbolication
Wrap the root in an error boundary for JS errors

root_cause: Product analytics require an SDK + screen tracking.
fix: Use an analytics SDK (Segment, Amplitude, Firebase)
Track screen views via the navigation state listener
Respect ATT (iOS) and consent before tracking

symptoms: iOS network call fails for http
root_cause: iOS ATS blocks insecure connections by default.
fix: Use HTTPS with valid certificates
Only for narrow dev cases, add ATS exceptions in Info.plist (not for prod)
Verify TLS version/cipher compatibility

root_cause: Apple requires a privacy manifest for certain APIs/SDKs.
fix: Add PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy declaring data use and required-reason APIs
Ensure third-party SDKs include their manifests/signatures
With Expo, use the config plugin/SDK that generates it

root_cause: Apple requires Sign in with Apple when other social logins exist.
fix: Use expo-apple-authentication (iOS 13+)
Enable the capability and handle the credential/token server-side
Provide it alongside other providers to satisfy review

root_cause: Launch screen and JS-ready handoff aren't coordinated.
fix: Configure expo-splash-screen and call preventAutoHideAsync, then hide after ready
Match launch storyboard background to app background
Avoid heavy work before first paint

root_cause: TestFlight has setup steps.
fix: Build with a distribution profile (eas build -p ios --profile production)
Submit with eas submit; complete export-compliance answers
Add internal/external testers in App Store Connect

symptoms: app icon not updating on iOS
root_cause: Icon assets/config not regenerated or device caches the icon.
fix: Set icon in app.json/Assets and re-run prebuild
Clean build folder and delete the app from device
Verify all required icon sizes are present

root_cause: AASA file or entitlement misconfigured.
fix: Host apple-app-site-association at /.well-known with correct appID and no extension
Add the Associated Domains entitlement (applinks:yourdomain)
Validate with Apple's CDN and reinstall the app

symptoms: Sentry: symbols not found for iOS crash
root_cause: Debug symbols weren't uploaded for symbolication.
fix: Enable Sentry's dSYM upload in the build phase / EAS
Ensure DEBUG_INFORMATION_FORMAT = dwarf-with-dsym for release
Re-upload dSYMs from App Store Connect if needed

symptoms: app must target a newer API level (Play)
root_cause: Google Play enforces a minimum targetSdkVersion for updates.
fix: Bump targetSdkVersion/compileSdkVersion to the required level
Address behavior changes for the new target (permissions, foreground services)
Test thoroughly on the new API level

root_cause: Back press needs explicit handling outside navigation.
fix: Use BackHandler.addEventListener('hardwareBackPress', ...) and return true to consume
Remove the listener on unmount
Prefer navigation's built-in back behavior when possible

symptoms: adaptive icon looks cropped on Android
root_cause: Adaptive icons need foreground/background layers with safe zone.
fix: Provide foreground/background per the adaptive icon spec (keep content in the safe zone)
Configure android.adaptiveIcon in app.json
Preview on different launcher mask shapes

root_cause: Android 12 introduced the SplashScreen API.
fix: Use expo-splash-screen / the SplashScreen API and set the windowSplashScreen theme
Provide a properly sized splash icon
Test on API 31+ devices

symptoms: upload key vs app signing key
root_cause: Play manages the app signing key; you keep an upload key.
fix: Enroll in Play App Signing; upload with your upload key
Let EAS manage credentials or store the upload keystore securely
Register SHA-256 from Play for services like Google Sign-In/App Links

root_cause: assetlinks.json or intent filters misconfigured.
fix: Host /.well-known/assetlinks.json with the correct package + SHA-256
Add autoVerify intent filters in the manifest
Verify with: adb shell pm get-app-links <package>

root_cause: The main thread is blocked too long (heavy JS bridge or native work).
fix: Move heavy work off the main/JS thread; chunk with InteractionManager
Profile with the Hermes/Android profiler to find the stall
Avoid synchronous bridge calls in hot paths

root_cause: Android 14 requires declaring foreground service types.
fix: Declare android:foregroundServiceType and the matching permission
Justify the service type for Play review
Test on API 34 devices

root_cause: Build variants need EAS profiles.
fix: Define profiles in eas.json (development, preview, production)
Use env/channel per profile and distribution settings
Build with eas build --profile <name>

symptoms: test native modules with fast refresh
root_cause: Expo Go can't include custom native code.
fix: Build a development build (eas build --profile development) with expo-dev-client
Install it on device/simulator and connect to Metro
Use it instead of Expo Go once you add custom native deps

root_cause: Secrets must not be committed and vary per environment.
fix: Define EAS environment variables/secrets and reference at build time
Use EXPO_PUBLIC_ only for non-sensitive values (they ship in the bundle)
Keep real secrets server-side

root_cause: Stores reject duplicate build numbers.
fix: Enable autoIncrement in eas.json or bump version/buildNumber/versionCode
Keep a single source of truth for versioning
Automate in CI to avoid manual mistakes

root_cause: Unoptimized assets and unused code inflate size.
fix: Enable Hermes and Proguard/R8; split per-ABI APKs or use AAB
Compress images and remove unused assets/locales
Audit dependencies; lazy-load heavy features

root_cause: Manual releases are error-prone.
fix: Use EAS Build/Submit in CI (or fastlane for bare)
Store credentials in EAS or CI secrets
Gate production submits behind approvals

symptoms: monorepo Metro can't resolve workspace packages
root_cause: Metro needs watchFolders and proper node_modules resolution in a monorepo.
fix: Set watchFolders to the repo root and configure resolver.nodeModulesPaths
Use Expo's monorepo metro config helper
Avoid duplicate React/React Native versions (hoist or dedupe)

symptoms: Invariant: Native module cannot be null
root_cause: Multiple React/RN versions resolved in a monorepo.
fix: Dedupe and pin a single react/react-native version
Hoist shared deps; use resolutions/overrides
Verify with npm ls react-native

root_cause: RN apps don't emit head tags by default.
fix: Use expo-router's <Head> (or react-native-helmet-async) to set title/meta on web
Pre-render/static-export routes that need SEO (expo export -p web)
Provide Open Graph tags for sharing

root_cause: Hover is web-only and needs explicit handling.
fix: Use Pressable's hovered state (web) for hover styling
Guard hover-only affordances behind Platform.OS==='web'
Ensure touch targets still work without hover

root_cause: Everything is bundled eagerly for web.
fix: Code-split with React.lazy/Suspense and route-based splitting
Tree-shake and avoid importing native-only heavy libs on web
Analyze the web bundle and lazy-load rarely-used screens

root_cause: RN Text disables selection by default on web.
fix: Set selectable on <Text> where selection is expected
Use proper semantic roles for headings/links on web
Test keyboard and mouse selection

root_cause: Web needs explicit focus order and visible focus.
fix: Use focusable/tabIndex via accessibility props; manage focus with refs
Provide visible focus styles (Pressable focused state)
Test full keyboard-only navigation

root_cause: RNW maps flex layout to the DOM; full-height needs a root height.
fix: Ensure html/body/#root have height:100% (or use min-height)
Use flex:1 containers consistently
Test mobile browser viewport quirks

root_cause: Startup cost comes from bundle size and pre-paint JS work.
fix: Profile with the Hermes sampling profiler / Android Studio
Defer non-critical work with InteractionManager and lazy imports
Enable Hermes and reduce the initial module graph

symptoms: app slows after navigating a lot
root_cause: Leaked listeners, timers, or retained large objects.
fix: Clean up subscriptions/timers in useEffect cleanups
Avoid retaining large images/data; release players and caches
Profile heap with Hermes/Xcode Instruments

root_cause: setState called during render or an effect with bad dependencies.
fix: Don't call setState directly in render; move to effects/handlers
Fix useEffect dependency arrays to avoid loops
Memoize callbacks/values feeding effects

symptoms: Can't perform a React state update on an unmounted component
root_cause: Async callback resolves after the component unmounts.
fix: Cancel async work in the effect cleanup (AbortController/flag)
Prefer react-query which handles this for you
Guard setState with a mounted ref as a last resort

symptoms: Unable to load script. Make sure you're running Metro
red screen: could not connect to development server
root_cause: Metro isn't running or the device can't reach it.
fix: Start Metro (npx react-native start) and reload
For device: adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 (Android) or set the dev server host
Confirm firewall/network and the bundle URL

root_cause: react-native-gesture-handler not built into the native app.
fix: Rebuild the native app after install (not just JS reload)
iOS: pod install; ensure autolinking picked it up
Wrap root in GestureHandlerRootView

symptoms: Tried to register two views with the same name
root_cause: Two libraries (or duplicate installs) register the same native view.
fix: Deduplicate dependencies and pin a single version
Check for duplicate react-native-svg / map / video installs
Clean and rebuild after resolving versions

root_cause: A native module is missing/incompatible with the New Architecture or wasn't rebuilt.
fix: Rebuild native after dependency/arch changes; reinstall pods
Verify the library supports your RN version and (if enabled) the New Architecture
Check autolinking and that the pod/gradle module is present

root_cause: Localization needs a translation layer plus locale detection and RTL handling.
fix: Use i18next/react-i18next (or expo-localization for locale/region)
Detect device locale and allow manual override; lazy-load translation bundles
Handle RTL with I18nManager and test mirrored layouts

root_cause: FlashList needs a reasonable estimatedItemSize to recycle cells; a missing/wrong value causes blanking.
fix: Pass estimatedItemSize close to the average row height
Avoid changing item heights drastically without overrideItemLayout
Keep renderItem pure and memoized

root_cause: Manual height/opacity animations are error prone across platforms.
fix: Use Reanimated layout animations: entering={FadeIn} exiting={FadeOut}
Use Layout transition on reordered items
Keep worklets on the UI thread for 60fps

root_cause: The new Gesture API replaces the older gesture component props.
fix: Wrap root in GestureHandlerRootView
Compose gestures with Gesture.Pan(), Gesture.Tap() and GestureDetector
Drive animations from gesture callbacks via Reanimated shared values

root_cause: Missing GestureHandlerRootView at the app root, common after manual setup.
fix: Wrap the whole app in <GestureHandlerRootView style={{flex:1}}>
On older setups confirm MainActivity uses ReactActivityDelegate correctly
Rebuild native after install

root_cause: Building a performant bottom sheet by hand is hard; use a maintained library.
fix: Use @gorhom/bottom-sheet with Reanimated and Gesture Handler
Define snapPoints and use BottomSheetModalProvider for modal sheets
Use BottomSheetFlatList for scrollable content inside the sheet

symptoms: KeyboardAvoidingView wrong offset with bottom tabs
input still hidden when tab bar present
root_cause: keyboardVerticalOffset must account for header/tab bar height.
fix: Set keyboardVerticalOffset to the header height (use useHeaderHeight())
Prefer react-native-keyboard-controller for consistent behavior
Test on both platforms; Android often needs windowSoftInputMode=adjustResize

root_cause: Built-in keyboard APIs differ per platform and lack smooth animations.
fix: Adopt react-native-keyboard-controller for unified, animated keyboard handling
Use KeyboardAwareScrollView from the same lib for forms
Drive content offset with the provided Reanimated values

root_cause: The native splash is hidden before the first frame/data is ready.
fix: Use expo-splash-screen and call preventAutoHideAsync() early
Hide with hideAsync() after fonts/initial data load
Match splash background to your app theme to avoid flashes

symptoms: Android app icon shows white background
root_cause: Android adaptive icons need separate foreground/background layers.
fix: Provide foregroundImage and backgroundColor in app.json android.adaptiveIcon
Keep critical content within the safe zone (66% center)
Regenerate with prebuild and rebuild the app

symptoms: roll back a bad OTA update
root_cause: OTA updates need channel/branch mapping to roll forward or back safely.
fix: Map build channels to update branches (production/preview)
Publish with eas update --branch; roll back via eas update --branch production --republish
Gate updates with runtimeVersion to avoid shipping JS incompatible with native

root_cause: Builds need distinct config, signing, and env per environment.
fix: Define profiles in eas.json (development, preview, production)
Use environment-specific app variants (different bundle ids) for side-by-side installs
Inject env via EAS secrets or build-time env files

symptoms: submit app to App Store / Play Store
root_cause: Manual store uploads are slow and error-prone.
fix: Use eas submit -p ios/android with stored credentials
Configure App Store Connect API key and Google service account JSON
Combine with eas build for a full CI pipeline

symptoms: how to debug RN now that Flipper is removed
root_cause: Flipper was removed by default in RN 0.74; the new debugger replaces it.
fix: Press j in the Metro terminal to open React Native DevTools
Use the new Hermes-based debugger for breakpoints and the React tree
Use Reactotron or Sentry for network/state inspection if needed

symptoms: inspect network and state during dev
root_cause: Network/state inspection needs a dedicated tool after Flipper removal.
fix: Use Reactotron for logs, network, and Redux/MobX state
Or integrate Sentry/Bugsnag breadcrumbs for production traces
Wrap fetch/axios with a logging interceptor in __DEV__ only

symptoms: capture production JS and native crashes
root_cause: Without crash reporting, production failures are invisible.
fix: Install @sentry/react-native and run the wizard for native setup
Upload Hermes source maps so stack traces are symbolicated
Set release/dist to match build numbers for grouping

symptoms: Sentry shows bundle offsets not function names
root_cause: Hermes bytecode source maps were not uploaded for the release.
fix: Generate and upload Hermes source maps during the build
Use the Sentry/Expo plugin to automate upload on EAS builds
Match the release version exactly between build and upload

symptoms: Can't perform a React state update on an unmounted component
root_cause: Event subscriptions/timers are not cleaned up in useEffect.
fix: Return a cleanup function from useEffect that removes the subscription
Store subscription handles and call .remove()/clearInterval on unmount
Use AbortController to cancel in-flight fetches

symptoms: pause work when app is in background
root_cause: App lifecycle needs AppState to react to foreground/background transitions.
fix: Subscribe to AppState.addEventListener('change', handler)
Refetch data or refresh tokens when state becomes 'active'
Pause timers/polling on 'background' to save battery

root_cause: Apps must react to connectivity changes for good UX.
fix: Use @react-native-community/netinfo to subscribe to connectivity
Check isConnected and isInternetReachable separately
Queue mutations while offline and flush on reconnect

root_cause: OS background execution is throttled and requires explicit registration.
fix: Use expo-task-manager + expo-background-fetch and register the task
Expect OS-controlled intervals; do not rely on exact timing
On iOS enable Background Modes; test with the debug trigger

root_cause: Location requires runtime permission and proper accuracy/timeout settings.
fix: Request foreground permission with expo-location before reading position
Add NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription and Android location permissions
Use appropriate accuracy; set a timeout and handle the denied case

root_cause: Google Maps requires API keys configured per platform.
fix: Add Google Maps API keys in app config (ios.config.googleMapsApiKey / android.config.googleMaps.apiKey)
Enable the Maps SDK for iOS and Android in Google Cloud
On iOS you can use Apple Maps (PROVIDER_DEFAULT) to avoid keys

symptoms: thousands of pins freeze the map
root_cause: Rendering every marker individually overwhelms the map.
fix: Cluster markers (react-native-map-clustering or native clustering)
Render only markers within the visible region
Use tracksViewChanges={false} on static markers to stop re-renders

root_cause: Camera access needs permissions and a performant camera library.
fix: Use react-native-vision-camera (high perf) or expo-camera for simpler needs
Request camera permission and add usage description strings
For QR/barcode use a code scanner plugin/frame processor

root_cause: Photo library access needs scoped permissions and usage strings.
fix: Use expo-image-picker and request media library permission
Add NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription (and limited-access handling on iOS 14+)
Handle the cancelled result and large-image downscaling

root_cause: RN fetch supports FormData but file URIs must be passed correctly.
fix: Build FormData and append { uri, name, type } for the file part
Do not set Content-Type manually; let fetch set the multipart boundary
For large/resumable uploads use expo-file-system uploadAsync or tus

root_cause: File persistence needs the filesystem API and correct directories.
fix: Use expo-file-system downloadAsync to documentDirectory or cacheDirectory
Use cacheDirectory for disposable files, documentDirectory for persistent
Check free space and handle download progress/errors

root_cause: Hand-rolled fetch state leads to duplicated caching and stale data bugs.
fix: Use TanStack Query (react-query) for caching, retries, and invalidation
Set sensible staleTime/gcTime and use queryKey arrays
Persist the cache for offline with the AsyncStorage persister

root_cause: Teams over-adopt heavy state libraries for simple client state.
fix: Use Zustand or Jotai for lightweight client state
Keep server state in React Query, client/UI state in Zustand
Reserve Redux Toolkit for complex, highly-shared state with middleware needs

root_cause: Large/relational local data needs a real database, not AsyncStorage.
fix: Use expo-sqlite (or op-sqlite) for SQL storage on device
Wrap queries in transactions for bulk writes
Consider WatermelonDB/Drizzle for ORM-style access at scale

root_cause: AsyncStorage is async and relatively slow for hot, synchronous reads.
fix: Use react-native-mmkv for fast synchronous key/value access
Migrate hot settings/flags to MMKV; keep large blobs elsewhere
Wrap MMKV in a typed helper for get/set with JSON

root_cause: Nested scroll conflicts and Android needs nestedScrollEnabled.
fix: Set nestedScrollEnabled on the inner scrollable (Android)
Avoid nesting a VirtualizedList inside a plain ScrollView; use a single list with header/footer
Use a FlatList ListHeaderComponent instead of wrapping in ScrollView

symptoms: VirtualizedLists should never be nested inside plain ScrollViews
root_cause: A FlatList/SectionList placed inside a ScrollView breaks virtualization.
fix: Use the list's ListHeaderComponent/ListFooterComponent for surrounding content
If you truly need mixed content, use a single SectionList
Only nest a list with a different orientation (horizontal in vertical)

root_cause: No debounce/guard allows rapid duplicate presses.
fix: Guard navigation with a ref flag or disable the button after first press
Use navigation's preventDefault or a debounce on the handler
Re-enable after the screen transition completes

root_cause: Inline StyleSheet objects don't scale to theming and design tokens.
fix: Adopt a styling system (Tamagui, Nativewind, or Restyle) with tokens
Centralize colors/spacing/typography in a theme and consume via hooks
Switch themes by swapping the token set, not rewriting styles

root_cause: NativeWind needs the Babel/Metro and Tailwind content config set up.
fix: Add nativewind/babel to babel config and configure metro with withNativeWind
Set content globs in tailwind.config.js to include all component files
Restart Metro with --reset-cache after config changes

symptoms: extra space on Android with SafeAreaView
root_cause: RN's built-in SafeAreaView is iOS-focused; behavior differs on Android.
fix: Use SafeAreaView/useSafeAreaInsets from react-native-safe-area-context
Apply insets manually with padding for fine control
Wrap the app once in SafeAreaProvider

symptoms: Unable to load script. Make sure you're running Metro
root_cause: The device can't reach the Metro bundler, or no bundle is embedded.
fix: Ensure Metro is running and run adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 for USB devices
Shake device > Settings > set the correct dev server host/port
For release, confirm the JS bundle is bundled into the app

root_cause: ADB can't see the device due to USB debugging, drivers, or daemon issues.
fix: Run adb devices; enable USB debugging on the device
Restart the daemon: adb kill-server && adb start-server
For Wi-Fi use adb connect <ip>:5555 after adb tcpip 5555

root_cause: Emulator storage is full or a previously installed app signature conflicts.
fix: Uninstall the old app: adb uninstall <applicationId>
Wipe emulator data or create a larger AVD
Ensure debug/release signatures don't clash on the same device

symptoms: Could not connect to development server (iOS)
root_cause: iOS app can't find the Metro bundle URL or it's not embedded for release.
fix: Start Metro and ensure the simulator uses localhost:8081
Clean build folder and rebuild; verify the bundle build phase exists
For physical devices set the correct host in the dev menu

root_cause: Polling, timers, and unthrottled location/animations drain battery.
fix: Pause polling/animations when AppState is background
Use push instead of frequent polling; batch network requests
Lower location accuracy and stop updates when not needed

root_cause: Eagerly importing heavy screens/libraries bloats the startup bundle.
fix: Lazy-load heavy screens with React.lazy/Suspense or dynamic import
Use the Metro bundle visualizer to find large dependencies
Move rarely used features behind on-demand loading

symptoms: TextInput lags while typing on Android
root_cause: Typing updates state high in the tree, re-rendering large subtrees.
fix: Keep input state local to the input component
Debounce expensive work derived from the value
Memoize sibling components so they don't re-render on each keystroke

root_cause: Manual form state and validation is verbose and error-prone.
fix: Use react-hook-form with Controller for RN inputs
Validate with a zod/yup resolver and show field errors
Use mode onBlur/onChange thoughtfully to avoid excess renders

root_cause: Biometric auth needs platform APIs and usage descriptions.
fix: Use expo-local-authentication or react-native-biometrics
Add NSFaceIDUsageDescription on iOS; check hasHardware and isEnrolled
Pair biometrics with secure-store to unlock a saved token

root_cause: OAuth in mobile needs secure redirect handling and Apple sign-in compliance.
fix: Use expo-auth-session or a provider SDK with PKCE
Add Apple Sign In if you offer any third-party login (App Store rule)
Use a secure redirect scheme and store tokens in secure storage

symptoms: deep link not opening specific screen
root_cause: Linking config and platform verification files are missing.
fix: Define a linking config mapping URLs to routes in NavigationContainer/expo-router
iOS: add Associated Domains and host apple-app-site-association; Android: assetlinks.json + intent filters
Test with npx uri-scheme open or adb shell am start

symptoms: push notifications work in dev not production
root_cause: Production push needs APNs/FCM credentials and entitlements.
fix: Configure APNs key and FCM server credentials (EAS handles via credentials)
Enable Push Notifications capability and aps-environment entitlement on iOS
Request permission and register the device token after login

root_cause: The initial notification response isn't handled on cold start.
fix: Read getLastNotificationResponseAsync on launch to handle cold-start taps
Add a response listener for warm taps and route accordingly
Store a pending deep link and navigate once the navigator is ready

root_cause: Media playback needs a dedicated player and background mode config.
fix: Use expo-av or react-native-video for playback
Enable background audio mode and configure interruption behavior
Release/unload players on unmount to free resources

root_cause: Embedding web content needs react-native-webview with messaging.
fix: Use react-native-webview; communicate via injectedJavaScript and onMessage
Restrict navigation with onShouldStartLoadWithRequest
Set originWhitelist and handle the loading/error states

root_cause: Android blocks mixed HTTP/HTTPS content and needs JS enabled.
fix: Set javaScriptEnabled and domStorageEnabled where needed
Serve HTTPS; set mixedContentMode='compatibility' only if required
Check console via onMessage logging for the underlying error

symptoms: fonts work in dev not in release
root_cause: Fonts not linked into the native build for release.
fix: Load fonts with expo-font/useFonts and gate render until loaded
For bare RN, add fonts to assets and run npx react-native-asset
Reference the exact PostScript family name, not the filename

symptoms: emoji or tall script clipped on Android
root_cause: includeFontPadding and lineHeight defaults clip tall glyphs on Android.
fix: Set includeFontPadding:false and an adequate lineHeight on Text
Avoid fixed Text height; let it size to content
Test with tall scripts/emoji on Android specifically

root_cause: Testing RN needs the right renderer and matchers.
fix: Use @testing-library/react-native with jest and jest-expo preset
Query by accessibility role/label, fire events with fireEvent
Mock native modules in jest setup; use renderHook for hooks

symptoms: SyntaxError: Cannot use import statement outside a module (jest)
jest fails on ESM in node_modules
root_cause: Jest doesn't transform certain ESM node_modules by default.
fix: Use the jest-expo or react-native preset
Extend transformIgnorePatterns to include the offending package
Mock heavy native modules instead of transforming them

root_cause: E2E needs a gray/black-box runner that drives the real app.
fix: Use Maestro for simple YAML flows (fast to adopt)
Or Detox for tightly synchronized gray-box tests
Run E2E in CI against a built simulator/emulator artifact

symptoms: JS heap out of memory during bundling
root_cause: Metro/Hermes bundling exceeds the default Node heap on CI.
fix: Raise heap: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096
Use a larger CI runner for native builds
Cache node_modules/Pods/Gradle to cut time and memory pressure

symptoms: merge native changes between RN versions
root_cause: Native template files change between versions and must be reconciled.
fix: Use the React Native Upgrade Helper diff for your version jump
For Expo, bump SDK and run npx expo install --fix
Upgrade one minor at a time and test on both platforms

symptoms: should I enable the New Architecture now
root_cause: RN is moving to bridgeless New Architecture by default; libraries vary in support.
fix: Check reactnative.directory for New Arch support of your deps
Enable on a branch and run full regression on both platforms
Keep the interop layer for any remaining legacy native modules

root_cause: Haptics improve UX feedback but need a cross-platform API.
fix: Use expo-haptics (impactAsync/notificationAsync) for tactile feedback
Trigger on key actions: selection, success, error
Keep haptics subtle and respect reduce-motion/accessibility settings

root_cause: Android translucent status bar draws under content without padding.
fix: Use safe-area insets for top padding instead of hardcoding
Configure StatusBar translucent and backgroundColor consistently
With expo-router/React Navigation, let the header manage the inset

root_cause: Ignoring OS font scaling hurts accessibility and breaks layouts.
fix: Allow allowFontScaling (default) and design flexible layouts
Cap extreme scaling with maxFontSizeMultiplier where layout breaks
Test with the largest accessibility text sizes

root_cause: Missing accessibility props and grouping confuse screen readers.
fix: Set accessible, accessibilityLabel, and accessibilityRole on interactive elements
Group related text with accessible container and importantForAccessibility
Hide decorative elements with accessibilityElementsHidden/importantForAccessibility='no'

root_cause: Synchronous heavy work on the JS thread blocks rendering.
fix: Move heavy work to a Reanimated worklet or InteractionManager.runAfterInteractions
Chunk large loops and yield to keep the frame budget
For true parallelism use react-native-worklets or a native module

root_cause: Excess logging and dev-only code ship to production.
fix: Strip logs in release with babel-plugin-transform-remove-console
Guard dev code behind __DEV__
Send meaningful events to analytics/crash tools instead of console

symptoms: hide API keys in the app
root_cause: Client bundles can be reverse-engineered; secrets in the app are not safe.
fix: Never embed long-lived secrets; proxy through your backend
Use short-lived tokens and server-side API keys
Hermes bytecode helps but is not a security boundary

root_cause: Sensitive apps need integrity checks for compliance.
fix: Use a jailbreak/root detection library as a signal, not a guarantee
Combine with Play Integrity API / App Attest for stronger checks
Enforce critical checks server-side, not only on device

root_cause: Default TLS trusts system CAs; high-security apps may need pinning.
fix: Use react-native-ssl-pinning or native network security config for pinning
Pin to a leaf or intermediate public key, with backup pins
Plan a rotation strategy to avoid bricking the app on cert change

root_cause: Reading/writing shared values outside worklets or missing useAnimatedStyle.
fix: Read shared values via useAnimatedStyle/useDerivedValue worklets
Use runOnJS to call JS from a worklet and runOnUI for the reverse
Confirm the Reanimated Babel plugin is last in the plugins list

symptoms: Reanimated 2 failed to create a worklet
root_cause: The react-native-reanimated/plugin is missing or not last in babel config.
fix: Add 'react-native-reanimated/plugin' as the LAST item in babel.config.js plugins
Clear cache: npx react-native start --reset-cache
Rebuild the app after the babel change

root_cause: Layout changes don't animate by default.
fix: Use Reanimated Layout animations or measure then animate height
On Android enable LayoutAnimation via setLayoutAnimationEnabledExperimental
Prefer Reanimated for reliable cross-platform results

symptoms: app crashes accessing storage on Android 13
root_cause: Android 13 replaced broad storage permission with granular media permissions.
fix: Request READ_MEDIA_IMAGES/VIDEO/AUDIO instead of READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
Prefer the photo picker which needs no permission
Update target SDK and test the new permission flow

root_cause: Android 13+ requires runtime POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission.
fix: Request POST_NOTIFICATIONS at runtime before posting notifications
Handle the denied state gracefully and offer a settings deep link
Declare the permission in the manifest (config plugin handles it on Expo)

root_cause: Android 15 enforces edge-to-edge; apps must apply window insets.
fix: Apply safe-area/window insets to padding instead of assuming opaque bars
Use react-native-safe-area-context everywhere relevant
Test on Android 15 with gesture navigation enabled

root_cause: Sharing files needs the platform share sheet with a content URI.
fix: Use expo-sharing shareAsync(uri) for files
Use the built-in Share API for plain text/URLs
Ensure the file is in an accessible directory before sharing

root_cause: Store billing requires native IAP integration and receipt validation.
fix: Use RevenueCat (react-native-purchases) to simplify IAP and subscriptions
Validate entitlements server-side via webhooks
Test with sandbox accounts and Play/App Store test tracks

root_cause: Analytics SDKs need init before events and correct consent/flush config.
fix: Initialize the analytics SDK once at startup before logging events
Respect tracking consent (ATT on iOS) before initializing
Flush on background; verify with debug/live event views

symptoms: App Store rejects for missing ATT prompt
root_cause: iOS requires App Tracking Transparency before accessing IDFA/cross-app tracking.
fix: Request permission with expo-tracking-transparency before tracking
Add NSUserTrackingUsageDescription to Info.plist
Gate analytics/ads SDK init on the user's ATT choice

root_cause: Stores require accurate disclosure of data collection and usage.
fix: Audit every SDK for what data it collects (analytics, crash, ads)
Fill App Privacy details and Android Data Safety form accurately
Add a privacy policy URL and in-app account deletion if you have accounts

symptoms: app crashes only on specific Android device
root_cause: OEM-specific behavior or missing ABI/native lib for that device.
fix: Check Play Console crash clusters by device/ABI
Build universal APK or include required ABIs (arm64-v8a, armeabi-v7a)
Reproduce on a matching emulator/device and add defensive handling

symptoms: Play Store requires AAB not APK
root_cause: Google Play requires Android App Bundles for new apps.
fix: Build an .aab: cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease (or eas build)
Let Play App Signing manage the signing key
Test the bundle with bundletool before upload

root_cause: Unsplit ABIs, large assets, and unused libraries bloat the binary.
fix: Ship AAB so Play delivers per-device ABIs/resources
Enable resource shrinking and remove unused assets/locales
Compress images and lazy-load big media

root_cause: Unhandled render errors crash the whole tree without a fallback.
fix: Wrap screens in an ErrorBoundary that renders a fallback UI
Report caught errors to Sentry in componentDidCatch
Use react-native-error-boundary or a custom class component

root_cause: Rejected promises without catch surface as crashes or are swallowed.
fix: Always handle promise rejections; centralize with a global handler
Use try/catch in async functions and surface errors to the UI
Add a global error utility and report to crash tooling

root_cause: Naive offline handling loses writes and shows stale data.
fix: Use React Query mutations with an offline persister and retry on reconnect
Or adopt WatermelonDB/PowerSync for true offline-first sync
Resolve conflicts with server timestamps or version vectors

symptoms: dates shift between device and server
root_cause: Mixing local and UTC times without a timezone-aware library.
fix: Store/transmit UTC ISO strings; format for display in local time
Use date-fns-tz or Luxon for timezone-correct formatting
Avoid new Date(string) ambiguity; parse explicitly

root_cause: Hermes historically shipped without full ICU/Intl data.
fix: Enable Intl in Hermes (newer RN includes it) or polyfill with @formatjs
Verify currency/locale formatting on a real Android device
Bundle only the locales you need to limit size

root_cause: RTL requires I18nManager.forceRTL and an app restart to fully apply.
fix: Use I18nManager.allowRTL/forceRTL and reload the app to apply
Use start/end instead of left/right in styles
Test mirrored icons and gesture directions

root_cause: Heavy work runs during the transition animation.
fix: Defer heavy work with InteractionManager.runAfterInteractions
Render a lightweight placeholder, then hydrate after transition
Use native-stack for hardware-accelerated transitions

root_cause: React 18 StrictMode intentionally double-invokes effects in development.
fix: Make effects idempotent and clean up properly
Cancel duplicate fetches with AbortController
Remember this only happens in dev StrictMode, not production

root_cause: Untyped route strings cause runtime navigation bugs.
fix: Enable experiments.typedRoutes in app config for expo-router
Use Link href and router.push with generated types
Define params via the route file and useLocalSearchParams

root_cause: Missing _layout.tsx or +not-found route, or incorrect file naming.
fix: Ensure each route group has a _layout.tsx exporting a navigator
Add app/+not-found.tsx to catch unmatched routes
Use (group) folders for layout grouping without affecting the URL

symptoms: check if a library supports my setup
is this package New Arch compatible
root_cause: Library compatibility (platforms, New Arch, Expo) is easy to misjudge.
fix: Check reactnative.directory for platform/New Arch support badges
Verify the package's peerDependencies against your RN version
Prefer actively maintained libraries with recent releases

symptoms: Expo Go missing a native module
custom native code won't run in Expo Go
root_cause: Expo Go only includes the Expo SDK; custom native modules need a dev build.
fix: Create a development build with eas build --profile development
Install expo-dev-client and run with the custom dev client
Use Expo Go only for SDK-only prototyping

symptoms: modify native project from app config
root_cause: Native changes get wiped by prebuild unless expressed as config plugins.
fix: Use a config plugin to modify Info.plist/AndroidManifest declaratively
Keep all native modifications in plugins so prebuild --clean is safe
Use existing plugins (withInfoPlist, withAndroidManifest) as building blocks

symptoms: native changes disappear after expo prebuild
root_cause: Manually edited native files are overwritten by prebuild in CNG (continuous native generation).
fix: Move native edits into config plugins or app.json
Treat ios/ and android/ as generated when using prebuild
Or fully adopt the bare workflow and commit native dirs if you must hand-edit

symptoms: images flicker or reload on scroll
root_cause: Default Image lacks robust memory/disk caching and placeholders.
fix: Use expo-image with cachePolicy='memory-disk' and a blurhash/placeholder
Set recyclingKey in lists to reuse views correctly
Prefetch critical images with Image.prefetch

symptoms: too many yellow warnings in dev
root_cause: Noisy third-party warnings hide real issues during development.
fix: Fix the underlying warning rather than hiding it when possible
Suppress known-safe noise with LogBox.ignoreLogs([...]) sparingly
Never ship LogBox.ignoreAllLogs(); keep warnings visible in dev
